LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SCOTT CACURAK'S MOTION OPPOSING APPLICATION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 3, 2014 TO GIVE REPLYING PARTIES HYATT CORPORATION AND AMPCO SYSTEM PARKING THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. REPLYING PARTIES MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE REPLY TO PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 6, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION. JUDGE: MARLA J. Replying parties must deliver courtesy copies of the Reply to Plaintiff's Opposition to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 6, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted.
